text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I was watching one of my mother's plays on a
streaming site last night.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I don't even remember how many times I watched
it, but by the time I realized, it was already
morning.
choice_data_list: You must really love your mother's plays.
You must really love your mother's plays.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I do. Watching a play through the screen is nothing like experiencing the acoustics and intensity in person, but it's still... Yawn.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Sorry. I'll have to be mindful not to pull any more
all-nighters. I'll try to wake myself up in time for
training.
